model_output_solution_source:
package main

func solutionChecksumBytes(data []byte) uint64 {
	var hash uint64 = 1469598103934665603
	for _, b := range data {
		hash ^= uint64(b)
		hash *= 1099511628211
	}
	return hash
}

func run(ids, ts []uint32, levels, lens []uint16, iters int) uint64 {
	const prime uint64 = 1099511628211
	const offset uint64 = 1469598103934665603
	var hash uint64

	for iter := 0; iter < iters; iter++ {
		hash = offset
		for i := range ids {
			id := ids[i]
			hash ^= uint64(byte(id))
			hash *= prime
			hash ^= uint64(byte(id >> 8))
			hash *= prime
			hash ^= uint64(byte(id >> 16))
			hash *= prime
			hash ^= uint64(byte(id >> 24))
			hash *= prime

			t := ts[i]
			hash ^= uint64(byte(t))
			hash *= prime
			hash ^= uint64(byte(t >> 8))
			hash *= prime
			hash ^= uint64(byte(t >> 16))
			hash *= prime
			hash ^= uint64(byte(t >> 24))
			hash *= prime

			lv := levels[i]
			hash ^= uint64(byte(lv))
			hash *= prime
			hash ^= uint64(byte(lv >> 8))
			hash *= prime

			ln := lens[i]
			hash ^= uint64(byte(ln))
			hash *= prime
			hash ^= uint64(byte(ln >> 8))
			hash *= prime
		}
	}
	return hash
}
